title: ProDec 11 Piece Assorted 4 inch Mini Paint Rollers and Frame for a Smooth Finish with Emulsion, Gloss, Satin, Varnish, Woodstain on Interior Walls, Ceilings, Wood, Metal, 4"
features: Mixed pack of mini paint rollers for a smooth trade finish on a wide range of surfaces including walls, ceilings, wood and metal
4x medium pile woven mini rollers ideal for emulsion paints (eg. matt, silk, eggshell) on smooth and semi-smooth surfaces
3x high density foam mini rollers ideal for gloss and satin paints on smooth surfaces
3x gloss pile mohair mini rollers ideal for gloss, satin and woodstains on smooth surfaces
Ergonomic Screw fit mini roller frame with soft grip handle for comfort
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint This handy pack of 10 rollers and frame covers virtually all paint types and surfaces you'll need a mini roller for and is ideal as a project pack. Here's what you get in the pack, the key features and where each roller can be used: 4x Medium pile woven rollers Medium pile tiger stripe is ProDec's most popular roller with the trade due to its excellent balance of performance and value. It is a great choice for emulsion on smooth walls and ceilings and is equally at home with masonry paints on semi-smooth surfaces. PAINTS: Emulsion, Masonry SURFACES: Plaster, Drywall, Ceilings (including light to medium textured), Brick 3x High density foam rollers Foam mini rollers are widely used by professionals on wood and metal in preference to brushes as they enable faster, more efficient coverage with no brush marks. Trade quality foam is higher density and better quality than DIY grade foam and is a great choice for skirting boards, window sills, doors and panels. PAINTS: Gloss, Satin, Undercoat, Primer SURFACES: Wood, Metal 3x Mohair rollers Mohair rollers are the choice of professional decorators for applying paint or varnish to wide, flat areas of wood and metal such as panels. The pile is cut to 5mm to apply the optimum film thickness. PAINTS: Gloss, Satin, Varnish, Low viscosity woodstains SURFACES: Wood, Metal Soft grip frame The frame has an ergonomic soft grip handle for comfort, giving reduced hand fatigue during use. It also features a screw fitting for use with an extension pole.
